sources_checked.name: changelog.md
sources_checked.summary: FR-001 cited in 2026-05-26 nacl-sa-feature section + 2026-05-26 plan entry

sources_checked.name: live-neo4j-graph
sources_checked.summary: modules=4, use_cases=10, tasks=43; FR-001 intake 6 tasks all terminal w/ evidence; FeatureRequest{FR-001} release_tag=null

sources_checked.name: release-status.json
sources_checked.summary: release_tag=null (FR-001 not yet released); version.value=v0.2.0 (prior release)

sources_checked.name: exceptions
sources_checked.summary: 1 exception (EXC-2026-05-22-v020-historical-skipped-pr); expiry 2026-05-18 -> EXPIRED/frozen-in-history; affects skipped-pr gate only, not FR-001

deltas.details: Detected drift: graph.tasks=43 vs status.json.total_tasks=42 (off-by-one). Reconciled by setting total_tasks=43 to match the 43 live graph Task nodes (26 TECH + 17 UC BE/FE nodes). use_cases 10==10, modules 4==4.

deltas.assertion: changelog FR-IDs subset of graph FeatureRequest nodes
deltas.details: changelog cites FR-001; graph has FeatureRequest{id:'FR-001'}.
release_status.release_tag is null (FR-001 not released yet) -> assertion vacuously satisfied. Prior v0.2.0 historical state out of FR-001 scope.

deltas.assertion: conductor phase=quality_gate_passed implies all intake tasks terminal in status.json
deltas.details: Detected drift: FR-001 entries (TECH-025/026 pending, UC-004 phases pending, UC-200/300 be pending) lagged the graph. Reconciled by syncing each entry to its graph-terminal status; status.json pending now 0.
TECH-025/026 done; UC-200-BE/UC-300-BE/UC-004-BE done; UC-004-FE verified-pending. Fully consistent with conductor-state.json.

expired_exceptions.note: Frozen-in-history (expiry == v0.2.0 release date). Does not influence any FR-001 pair.

note: Two real drifts detected (P-S1 off-by-one task count; P-S4 status.json lagging graph for FR-001 task statuses), both root-caused to status.json not being updated as tasks completed while the graph (source of truth) was. Reconciled by syncing status.json to the live graph. No signed exception required. Separately: 6 carried-in .tl/tasks/*.md doc edits left uncommitted (out of FR-001 scope, conflict with ERROR->FAILED reconciliation) -- not part of any Phase-4.5 pair; flagged for /nacl-tl-reconcile.
